name: Vera Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Vera Therapeutics is a late clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing treatments for immunological and rare diseases. Its lead product candidate, atacicept, is being developed for IgA nephropathy (IgAN) and other kidney diseases. The company has no products approved for commercial sale and has not generated any revenue from product sales.

exposures.sentence: We are a late clinical-stage biotechnology company and we have no products approved for commercial sale, have not generated any revenue from product sales and have incurred losses since inception.
